title: Mellow Moist Fujian Mushrooms Mu Shu
description: A jammy and light Chinese dish featuring English mustard, perfect for midnight cravings, with an ovo-vegetarian friendly twist in the form of mu-shu.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the English mustard, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Pour the mustard mixture over the mushrooms and stir to combine.
Push the mushrooms to one side of the wok, then add a little more oil if necessary and scramble in the eggs.
Mix the eggs with the mushrooms and cook until the eggs are set.
Stir in the chopped green onions.
Warm the mu-shu pancakes by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the mu-shu by spooning the mushroom and egg mixture onto a pancake and serving immediately.
